body.title: Dreaming pass: Hebbian edge strengthening from co-activated memory nodes
body.description:
Igor's dreaming module synthesizes cross-session patterns and proposes memories but does NOT strengthen connections between co-activated nodes. MIT astrocyte research shows: when the mediating layer (interpretive_edges = our astrocyte analog) strengthens based on co-activation, memory capacity scales dramatically faster. Hebbian principle: nodes that activate together should wire together more strongly.

Add _strengthen_coactivated_edges() helper to dreaming.py, called from run() after synthesis step. Implementation:
1. Query recent clan.traces (last IGOR_DREAMING_LOOKBACK turns, default 100): SELECT nodes FROM clan.traces ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT N
2. Parse each traces.nodes JSON array (confirmed format: [{node_id, relevance, memory_type, sequence_pos}, ...]); extract node_id values per trace
3. Count co-activation frequency for all node pairs that appear in the same trace
4. For pairs with co-activation_count >= threshold (env IGOR_HEBBIAN_THRESHOLD, default 3): UPSERT clan.interpretive_edges (from_id, to_id, weight += 0.1, layer='hebbian') — create if not exists, strengthen if exists
5. Log count of edges created/strengthened
Non-blocking: wrap in try/except, log error, continue dreaming if this step fails.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/dreaming.py (add helper + call in run()); clan.interpretive_edges (UPSERT via dreaming.py)
**Design rules:** non-blocking on failure; configurable threshold + delta via env vars; new DB table access (clan.traces + clan.interpretive_edges) added to dreaming.py — verify connection pattern matches existing _conn() usage
**Scope boundary:** In: co-activation query, interpretive_edge UPSERT, log. Out: wg_edges strengthening (word-level, separate future enhancement), changing spreading activation algorithm, pruning weak edges.
**Test plan:** Mock traces with nodes A+B appearing in 5 same-turn traces. After run(), interpretive_edge(A,B) exists with weight>0. Pair appearing only 2 times (below threshold 3) does NOT create edge. Exception in _strengthen_coactivated_edges does not abort dreaming run().
